Method.Name: main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT CONVERT([NVARCHAR](60), r.[option]) AS %1, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](60), r.option_value) AS %2, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](60), r.type) AS %3, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](60), r.type_value) AS %4, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.details) AS %5, r.state AS %6, 1010 AS %7 FROM sys.database_automatic_tuning_configurations r", asOption, asOptionValue, asType, asTypeValue, asDetails, asState, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: initialize
construct
